description: Acme Cloud sells workflow automation software to mid-market and enterprise customers.

balance_sheet_survivability.summary: The company remains cash generative with no near-term debt pressure.

revenue_recurrence_contract_strength.summary: Net revenue retention eased to 113% as seat expansion slowed.

customer_concentration.summary: A newly expanded strategic customer now represents 12% of revenue.

pricing_power.summary: Renewal pricing still held despite slower seat growth.

demand_cyclicality_purchase_deferrabilit.summary: SMB customers delayed new seat purchases for budget reasons.

variant_view.summary: The quarter undermines the prior fast-reacceleration variant view because usage proof is arriving later than expected.

timing_path_dependency.summary: Management pushed the attach-rate milestone into the following quarter, compressing the catalyst path.

falsification_kill_criteria.summary: Sell-side desks now frame the spring product launch as a kill criterion for the upside case.

catalyst_path.summary: The catalyst chain now relies on a compressed sequence of launch proof and guidance repair instead of a gradual rerating path.

milestone_checklist.summary: The market added launch readiness and attach-rate disclosure as make-or-break milestones after the quarter.
